fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 71 uses strict greater-than (`now > deadline`) instead of greater-than-or-equal (`now >= deadline`), so a session is incorrectly returned as valid when `now` equals the deadline.

constraints.intent: At the expiry check, when now equals deadline the condition must be true (expired), but strict > misses the equality case.
Verify that when now equals deadline__2 the subsequent branch will treat the session as expired (now >= deadline__2 should trigger expiry).
In the else branch (session considered valid), now must be strictly less than deadline; equality should not reach here.

spec.expr: not (__cbfl_result is not None and __cbfl_result != default) or now < deadline__2

constraints.intent: The cached value should only be returned when now is strictly before the deadline.
